columns.name: aar
columns.description: The year for the annual work time entry

columns.name: timeKode
columns.description: The code representing the type of time entry

columns.name: tekst
columns.description: Additional text or description for the time entry

columns.name: kapasitetFaktor
columns.description: The factor representing capacity for the time entry

columns.name: slettet
columns.description: A flag indicating if the record has been deleted

columns.name: lonnArt
columns.description: The type of salary or pay associated with the time entry

columns.name: rapportLonn
columns.description: Indicates if the salary has been reported

columns.name: rapportFraV
columns.description: Indicates if absence time has been reported

columns.name: enhet
columns.description: The unit or category of the time entry

columns.name: brukerid
columns.description: The identifier for the user associated with the time entry

columns.name: tidspunkt
columns.description: The timestamp of when the time entry was recorded
